data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the last processed event checkpoint.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'last processed event checkpoint' requirement, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or details regarding how this requirement is being satisfied. While the linked use case mentions the need for a last processed event checkpoint, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this checkpoint is being recorded or validated, leading to a conclusion that the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of the last processed event checkpoint being recorded or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the last processed event checkpoint requirement.
